where.if: AND (1=0 OR e.event_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR e.event_title ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND e.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND e.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND e.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND e.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmEvent :: selectById */ e.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_et.code_label AS event_type_cd_nm , cd_es.code_label AS event_status_cd_nm , cd_et2.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM pm_event e LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = e.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_et ON cd_et.code_grp = 'EVENT_TYPE' AND cd_et.code_value = e.event_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_es ON cd_es.code_grp = 'EVENT_STATUS' AND cd_es.code_value = e.event_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_et2 ON cd_et2.code_grp = 'EVENT_TARGET' AND cd_et2.code_value = e.target_type_cd WHERE e.event_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmEvent :: selectList */ e.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_et.code_label AS event_type_cd_nm , cd_es.code_label AS event_status_cd_nm , cd_et2.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM pm_event e LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = e.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_et ON cd_et.code_grp = 'EVENT_TYPE' AND cd_et.code_value = e.event_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_es ON cd_es.code_grp = 'EVENT_STATUS' AND cd_es.code_value = e.event_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_et2 ON cd_et2.code_grp = 'EVENT_TARGET' AND cd_et2.code_value = e.target_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmEvent :: selectPageList */ e.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_et.code_label AS event_type_cd_nm , cd_es.code_label AS event_status_cd_nm , cd_et2.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM pm_event e LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = e.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_et ON cd_et.code_grp = 'EVENT_TYPE' AND cd_et.code_value = e.event_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_es ON cd_es.code_grp = 'EVENT_STATUS' AND cd_es.code_value = e.event_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_et2 ON cd_et2.code_grp = 'EVENT_TARGET' AND cd_et2.code_value = e.target_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(e.*) /* base.ec.pm :: PmEvent :: selectPageCount */ FROM pm_event e
